prompt: I have an existing C++ project in /tmp/cpp_eval_legacy that only has a Makefile and a single src/main.cpp with a hello-world program. Modernize it using the C++ project setup skill: switch to CMake + vcpkg, add a reusable library, GoogleTest tests, clang-format, clang-tidy, and VS Code settings. Preserve the existing hello-world behavior.
assertions: The original src/main.cpp hello-world logic is preserved or moved without losing behavior
CMakeLists.txt is created and references a library target
tests/ directory with at least one GoogleTest file is added
README.md explains how to build and test the modernized project
